libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, external WebDAV server, servlet container, environment variable, or system property appears necessary. Prefer pure unit tests with local stubs/mocks for HttpServletRequest/HttpServletResponse and Jackrabbit WebDAV interfaces.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The 2.0-beta4 POM declares servlet-api with provided scope, and key library classes such as DavServletRequest, DavServletResponse, WebdavRequestImpl, WebdavResponseImpl, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, header parsers, and AbstractWebdavServlet reference javax.servlet/http types. input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The upstream 2.0-beta4 parent manages servlet-api as 2.3, while the existing repository tests use 2.4; 2.4 is backward-compatible, but local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.

The reported native-image runtime failures look like test/runtime behavior issues rather than missing external service setup, so this dependency may be necessary for coverage but not sufficient to fix all native-run failures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV exposes servlet-facing request, response, header, IO, and AbstractWebdavServlet APIs; the artifact declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, so meaningful tests of those normal APIs need the servlet API on the test classpath.
